## PiPipe.createApp() method

Builds a configured `uWebSockets.js` application without starting it.

**Signature:**

```typescript
createApp(): TemplatedApp;
```

**Returns:**

TemplatedApp

Configured app instance.

## Remarks

This is mainly useful when another part of your program needs access to the configured app instance before binding a socket.
